calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jul-30-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sheldon Wolfe for petitioner.

Mr. Wolfe explained that he spent over two hours telephoning operators of various counties, that the petitioner does not know the family of the wife that the decedent was not in contact with her family and that petition for spousal property was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jul-07-2014 Continued To Jul-21-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
